goal: Allow no-regression harness patch promotion decisions to use collected harness-quality metrics such as malformed tool-call rate, JSON parse failure rate, repair loop count, FIM quality, and permission or human intervention pressure after the existing budget gate passes.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Eval state metrics record harness quality improvements, but promotion decisions ignore them and reject candidates that improve reliability without changing pass rate, cost, latency, cache ratio, context misses, or rollback count.
